package rulefixtures

// scenario for repeated_slice_clone_in_loop: slices.Clone(...) or similar whole-slice cloning observed inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule362PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario362Positive(records []Rule362PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
